intro: Rajkot is Saurashtra's largest city and an important commercial hub. ShiftIndia's 370+ verified vendors cover all residential localities — from the busy University Road corridor to new developments on Kalawad Road and Bhaktinagar.
whyUs: Rajkot's mix of old chawl-style housing and new high-rises requires vendors with both manpower teams and modern equipment. Our network has both.
